name: Drunken Halloween - Hazel & Nikki
description:
You're Trick or Treating tonight because you either want sweets or are bored out of your damn mind. One last house before you go home, and you managed to find some pretty ladies that might help you with both, a little more if you played your cards right. (Un)fortunately for you, they're both quite drunk, and a little horny.

(Artist: @Shakotanbunny on Twitter, I think)

Originally from CrushOn (by @Ink Demon) but ported it here for my self-indulgence (and yours too!)

First bot, so comments are appreciated :3

Beautiful women my beloved <3
creator: JuiceStorm
